description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on push and pull requests to the master and vnext branches, as well as on page build and release created events. The workflow has two jobs: test and docs. The test job runs on a matrix of OS, Python versions, and Numba bounds checking settings, using a bash shell, and checks out the repository, caches conda packages, sets up miniconda, installs the package and its dependencies, runs tests with pytest, and uploads test results. The docs job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, caches conda packages, sets up miniconda, installs the package and its documentation dependencies, builds the documentation with sphinx, and uploads it as an artifact.
